name: agentspec_merge
description: Merge a child agent manifest with its parent using declared merge strategies. Enforces trust-restrict invariant: child cannot escalate parent permissions.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.resolver.merger import _merge,_assert_trust_restriction,TrustEscalationError;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=AgentManifest(**d['child']);p=AgentManifest(**d['parent']);m=_merge(p,c,c.merge);_assert_trust_restriction(c.trust,p.trust);print(json.dumps({'merged':m.model_dump(exclude_none=True),'trust_ok':True}))
